models.name: Qwen3-VL 4B (Vision)
models.description: Lightweight state-of-the-art vision model. Provides rapid image analysis and spatial reasoning with a low hardware footprint. Best used when VRAM is limited.

models.name: Qwen3-VL 8B (Vision)
models.description: Powerful 8-billion parameter vision model. Delivers significantly improved reasoning, fewer hallucinations, and much deeper descriptive capabilities for complex visual analysis. Recommended for advanced workflows.

models.name: Gemma 3 12B Q4 (Recommended)
models.description: Premium logic and translation model. Excellent command comprehension and strict formatting adherence. Highly recommended for complex JSON parsing and rich prompt translation.

models.name: Gemma 3 12B Q2 (Compact)
models.description: Highly compressed version of Gemma 3. Preserves core reasoning for translation and structuring tasks at a fraction of the VRAM cost, though with a slight reduction in nuance.

models.name: Llama 3.1 8B Lexi (Q2 - Uncensored)
models.description: Highly compressed 8B model. Uncensored and fast, ideal for low-VRAM systems while maintaining decent conversational reasoning.

models.name: Llama 3.1 8B Lexi (Q6 - Uncensored)
models.description: High-fidelity 8B model. Uncensored and precise, providing near-FP16 performance for complex reasoning and creative tasks.
